title: TECHSAVVY
subtitle: Website & Community Systems
summary: Central platform managing membership enrollment, seminar registration, and digital credentials for tech students.
overview: TECHSAVVY is the digital hub of Misamis Occidental's leading developer community. It integrates attendee lists, certificate templates, and event schedules into one unified layout.
problem: Manual distribution of event certificates was error-prone and consumed hours of organizer time.
role: Lead Architect and Community Developer, designing the automated generation workflow.
solution: Built a static-generated portal reading CSV rosters and drawing certificates onto HTML5 canvases for immediate PDF download.
features: Secure attendee self-validation system matching registration database hashes
Dynamic certificate drawing tool with custom font sizing and orientation
Upcoming schedule manager showing event dates, speakers, and resources

technicalDecisions.reason: Runs completely on GitHub Pages, ensuring high availability with $0 infrastructure costs.

challenges: Generating thousands of high-resolution certificates dynamically in-browser without crashing mobile tabs.
outcomes: Automated certificate delivery for over 800 participants, saving approximately 40+ hours of setup per tech event.
